uid.description: The unique ID of the user.

email.description: The email address of the user.

displayName.description: The display name of the user.

balance.description: The current balance of the user.

lastCheckInDate.description: The last date the user checked in (YYYY-MM-DD).

sponsorVisitCount.description: The number of sponsor visits today.

lastSponsorVisitDate.description: The last date the user visited a sponsor (YYYY-MM-DD).

referralCode.description: The referral code of the user.

isBlocked.description: Whether the user is blocked from the app.

Settings.title: Settings
Settings.description: Global application settings managed by the admin.

whatsappUrl.description: The URL for the WhatsApp group.

telegramUrl.description: The URL for the Telegram group.

sponsorUrl.description: The URL for the sponsor site.

geminiApiKey.description: The API key for Gemini services.

qrisUrl.description: The URL of the QRIS image.

isMaintenance.description: Whether the app is in maintenance mode.

Transaction.title: Transaction
Transaction.description: A record of a VIP package purchase request.

packageId.description: The ID of the selected package.

packageName.description: The name of the selected package.

senderBank.description: The bank or e-wallet name of the sender.

ownerName.description: The name of the account owner.

accountNumber.description: The account or phone number of the sender.

status.description: The current status of the transaction.

createdAt.description: The ISO timestamp when the transaction was created.

userId.description: The UID of the user who made the request.

userEmail.description: The email of the user who made the request.

/transactions.description: Collection of all VIP package purchase requests.
